messages.content: yep bringing my laptop and some route data from work for test cases
nbd ill get the airtable board set up
dude basic route input is done. moved it to done in airtable
tonight we start on results display?
yeah ive been thinking about the layout ill show u what i mocked up
pizza night? ill grab little caesars on the way
we should enter as a team
bro yes i was literally about to text u about that
dude her green chili is fire 🔥 im so in
bet what do we need to bring
just the chili and toppings they provide bowls and stuff
sick ill grab tortillas cheese and sour cream
lmk if theres a secret ingredient lol
lol she definately has one but ill get it out of her
dude 2nd place not bad for our first cook off
so close man who won first
yeah his brisket chili was legit ours was right there tho
i know right we just needed more heat imo
next year we add habaneros and its over
lol elena is gonna be so proud we got 2nd
tell her its all her recipe we just stirred the pot
hey man u free to talk? need ur help planning something
elenas 30th is march 14. thinking surprise camping trip to strawberry
right? just the two of us. maren watches rosie for the weekend
strawberry bay? that campground is solid ive been there
yeah site 47 right by the water. gonna try to book it this week
nice i can bring the tent and camp stove
perfect ill make a group chat w maren to coordinate
ik right we should show ppl at some point
lol definately not. idk maybe the ward or something
hmm thats not a bad idea actually
ok so ive been thinking about what u said about showing routegenie to people
like a live demo? im so down
just need a projector and a laptop. keep it casual
bet we got 6 weeks to polish it up 🔥
rode it yesterday. lower was ok but above ghost falls is all snowmelt
how far up did u get
sounds about right. lmk when its rideable im done w the trainer
so good. upper still needs a week or two
yeah but its getting there. few more warm days
need to work on the slideshow this week
nice i started the slides already. keeping it simple
yep. got the map working btw
no way dude thats huge. cant wait to see it
yo bst south should be clear now. sunday?
was literally about to text u. 730?
bst south was clean dude. best ride of the spring
haha nice one 🏔️ post it on strava
yeah garage like usual. lets time everything
thinking mill creek this weekend. pipeline trail. u in?
mill creek was incredible. 2.5 hrs longest ride of the year
dang 🔥 how far did u go
ok tmrw is the big day. u got the projector?
yeah borrowed it from my work. hdmi cable too
good call the cultural hall outlets are kinda weird
talking points. i do intro and problem, u do the live demo
exactly. 12 min total like the rehearsal
yo so brother kendricks son in law just texted me. he runs a delivery company in orem and wants to talk to u about routegenie. asked for your contact info. should i give him your work email or what
ok team. operation birthday is a go. strawberry reservoir march 14-15. elena turns 30 and shes getting a surprise camping trip
OMG YES!! I have been WAITING for you to plan something!!
maren i need u on rosie duty that weekend. friday afternoon thru saturday evening
ok im pretty sure im free let me double check w work and ill confirm next week
got it all in the garage ill check everything this weekend make sure nothings busted
ill handle the campsite and food. steaks on the fire, smores, the whole deal
OK officially confirmed for march 14-15!! rosie and i are gonna have the BEST time
does rosie still like those cheddar bunny crackers or has she moved on lol
still obsessed. ill send u the full rundown closer to the date
tent is good stove works cooler is clean. loading up tonight ill swing by at 645
perfect. food list: steaks, corn, potatoes, eggs, bacon, smores stuff, waters, that apple cider elena likes
this is SO exciting ok what time do i need to be there friday
can u come by around 630? ill tell elena im taking her for a birthday breakfast and we just keep driving lol
thats hilarious shes gonna be so confused 🔥
maren dont forget biscuit needs out at 6am and 9pm. food is in the pantry bottom shelf
wait do we need a grill or does the site have a fire pit
already got biscuits schedule in my notes dont worry about a THING!!
site 47 has a fire ring so were good. campfire permit is sorted
im hosting family dinner at my place!! thanksgiving edition
ill ask her. prob mashed potatoes
im doing turkey stuffing corn casserole and PIE
5 but come early if u can help set up!!
PERFECT make rosie wear that turkey dress i got her 😍
3 bed in millcreek 385k near bonneville trail!!
mare i literally started saving two weeks ago lol
i KNOW but you need to see whats out there
ok fine. actually its pretty nice. fenced yard too
saving it. gonna keep my eye on this area
drop everything and look at this house
huge yard fully fenced and its like ten min from little explorers!!
good morning to u too lol
thats in range. yard is amazing. biscuit would love this
ok yeah the kitchen is rough lol
hey are you guys still coming tonight
ok GOOD bring Rosie mom wants to see her!!
she keeps asking about her lol
nice want us to bring anything
hey so rosie stuff for this weekend. figured id write it all down for u
bedtime 730. pjs, brush teeth, then 2 books. shell try to negotiate for 3 but hold the line
the bear one w the honey pot and goodnight moon. theyre on her nightstand
cheddar bunnies, apple slices, string cheese. no juice after 5 or she wont sleep. water or milk
pancakes. shell ask for chocolate chips in them and thats fine
omg YES chocolate chip pancakes for aunt maren weekend!! anything else??
thats the main stuff. oh she might ask for elena at bedtime just say mommy and daddy went on an adventure and theyll be back tmrw
andrew thats amazing!! when do u tell elena
and i wanna have a few places picked out to show her
she is going to CRY oh my god. ok i have like 4 listings saved for u just say when

ok so i was at elenas book club thing last night and she was going on about how she wishes you guys could buy a house someday. andrew she looked so sad. should i just tell her?? it would make her SO happy and youre so close to 10k
so for christmas dinner at your parents
we need to figure it out
yeah good call whatre u thinking
i want to do tamales this year ❤️
yes please. what else do we need
maren said corn casserole and rolls and your mom is doing ham and potatoes
ok were set then. anything else
yeah ill go christmas eve morning
yeah shes fine shes playing with biscuit lol. me and colt are entering the ward chili cook off next saturday
jan 31 at the ward building. can i get ur green chili recipe
its the best green chili ive ever had we need to win this thing
the whole binder or just one page
the one with the green sticky tab but honestly i just eyeball everything 🙈
your resting heart rate has been really high the last few days
yeah im fine just stressed with work stuff
86 is really high for you though
i know. trevors piling on the wasatch valley onboarding and its a lot right now
maybe go for a ride this weekend to blow off steam
when is your next dr cho appointment
ok good just want you to be ok ❤️
ok ok you were right 😊 now come downstairs rosie made you a card
so the kitchen sink is dripping again
like under the cabinet not the faucet
under the cabinet? like on the floor?
yeah theres a littel puddle i put a towel down
ok let me check it out
yeah its the p trap connection. kinda loose
maybe but i dont wanna make it worse. gonna call a plumber tmrw
ok the towel is already soaked 🙈
ill double up the towles and put the bucket under there for tonight
emailed valley plumbing. should hear back today
the bucket had like an inch of water this morning
perfect ill make sure im home
its teh washer on the drain connection
checked under the sink this morning
completley dry no drip at all
no more towels under the sink haha 😂
hey so trevor messaged me about provo routes yesterday
yeah had to review them from home
yeah all good but gotta stay a couple hours late today for follow up
im fine ill be home by 5
hey babe have you taken biscuit to tanner park before
so my friend jessica from book club takes her dog every saturday morning
she said theres like a whole group of regulars who meet at 10
she said theres a bunch of goldens and labs and biscuit would love it
we should take him this saturday ❤️
yay biscuit is going to be SO happy
biscuit is having the best morning
who is that big brown one
we should bring rosie next time she would die
shed just chase dogs around the whole time lol
ok heading home soon biscuits totally wiped

hey babe so im trying to get our spending organized for the year. can you go through your email and pull together any receipts for purchases over $200? bike stuff amazon whatever. just forward them to me and ill add them to the spreadsheet
hey man its tyler from byu!! saw u on linkedin. we should grab lunch sometime
tyler! dude its been forever. yeah for sure man
nice im in slc most weekends now lmk when ur free
Hey Andrew, just confirming I got the check. Garage door seal should hold up a couple years. Let me know if anything comes up.
hey robinson! saw u popped up on my linkedin. u still doing logistics?
dave! yeah man still at it. summit ridge now. hows the warehouse gig
left that last year doing fleet management now. we should catch up
hey everyone did u guys get the notice about trash pickup changing to wednesdays
yeah just saw it. starts dec 1
ugh thats gonna be confusing for a while
has anyone seen a gray tabby cat? my neighbor linda lost hers yesterday
hey yall holiday party dec 20 at squatters downtown. whos in?
anyone ridden the pipeline trail this week
not yet. heard its still icy up top
i did saturday. lower half is good upper is a mess
thx. might hit it sunday then just stay low
service project this saturday 9am at the bishops storehouse. who can make it
great. bring work gloves if u got em
Reminder: You have an appointment with Dr. Nathan Cho on Jan 8 at 10:00 AM. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
GEICO: Your auto policy renewal is coming up on 12/15. Log in to review your policy or call 1-800-861-8380.
Xfinity: We're aware of a service outage in your area (84107). Our team is working to restore service. We'll update you when resolved.
Xfinity: Service has been restored in your area. Thank you for your patience.
Your Amazon package has been delivered to the front door.
Little Explorers Reminder: Spring Art Show is Thursday March 12, 5:30-7:00 PM. Come see your little artist's work!
Thanks for visiting Joyride Bikes! How's everything riding? Let us know if you need anything.
Your home warranty is about to expire. Call now to renew your coverage and protect your home. Reply STOP to opt out.
Your Beans & Brews reward is ready! Show this text for a FREE medium drip with any purchase. Expires 2/28.
Smith's: Save $3 on fresh chicken breast and get 2x fuel points on all purchases this week. Valid thru 3/28.
hey andrew havent seen u at basketball in a while. everything good?
no worries if ur busy just wanted to check in
Hi sweetheart! Are we doing anything for Easter this year? Dad and I are free that weekend. Love Mom
Also Rosies birthday is coming up soon! Should I start looking for gifts?
Maverik Adventure Club: You earned 150 pts this month! Redeem 500 pts for a free fountain drink at maverik.com
Wells Fargo: A login to your account was made on 12/19 at 8:15 PM from a recognized device. If this wasn't you, call 1-800-869-3557.

hey robinson did you see ridgeline freight is hiring a senior logistics manager? just popped up on my linkedin feed. salary looks way better than what we get lol. you should totally apply youd crush that role
